# Complex test: School management system with inheritance and multiple classes

@abstract
class Person:
    name: str
    age: int

    def __init__(self, name: str, age: int):
        self.name = name
        self.age = age

    @abstract
    def get_role(self) -> str:
        ...

    def get_info(self) -> int:
        return self.age

class Student(Person):
    student_id: int
    grade_level: int

    def __init__(self, name: str, age: int, sid: int, level: int):
        super().__init__(name, age)
        self.student_id = sid
        self.grade_level = level

    @override
    def get_role(self) -> str:
        return "Student"

    def advance_grade(self) -> None:
        self.grade_level += 1

class Teacher(Person):
    subject: str
    years_experience: int

    def __init__(self, name: str, age: int, subj: str, exp: int):
        super().__init__(name, age)
        self.subject = subj
        self.years_experience = exp

    @override
    def get_role(self) -> str:
        return "Teacher"

    def gain_experience(self, years: int) -> None:
        self.years_experience += years

class Classroom:
    room_number: int
    capacity: int
    enrolled: int

    def __init__(self, room: int, cap: int):
        self.room_number = room
        self.capacity = cap
        self.enrolled = 0

    def enroll_student(self) -> bool:
        if self.enrolled < self.capacity:
            self.enrolled += 1
            return True
        return False

    def get_available_seats(self) -> int:
        return self.capacity - self.enrolled

# Create students
s1: Student = Student("Alice", 15, 1001, 9)
s2: Student = Student("Bob", 16, 1002, 10)

# Create teacher
t1: Teacher = Teacher("Dr Smith", 45, "Math", 20)

# Create classroom
room: Classroom = Classroom(101, 30)

# Test student operations
print(s1.get_info())
print(s1.grade_level)
s1.advance_grade()
print(s1.grade_level)

# Test teacher operations
print(t1.get_info())
print(t1.years_experience)
t1.gain_experience(3)
print(t1.years_experience)

# Test classroom enrollment
print(room.get_available_seats())
enrolled1: bool = room.enroll_student()
enrolled2: bool = room.enroll_student()
print(room.enrolled)
print(room.get_available_seats())

# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
# 15
# 9
# 10
# 45
# 20
# 23
# 30
# 2
# 28
